changeSummary: Lineage node update for helios/example-policy-revision v1.0.0 after the steward-issued draft->active transition. The version identifier is unchanged at 1.0.0; what changed is the lifecycle state, recorded in the transition event (slot 12) and the transition audit-record (slot 14). This lineage node carries the committed-state lineage entry for v1.0.0 and remains the root of the lineage chain.
